results.category: QoS2 去重状态机覆盖不完整
results.reason: 实现按当前包直接处理并回包，缺少完整 QoS2 入站去重状态管理。
results.change_action: validity judgment changes; subsequent matching Packet Identifier is treated as a new publication
results.change_condition: After the receiver has sent a PUBCOMP, and it receives any subsequent PUBLISH packet that contains that Packet Identifier
results.original_comment: PUBCOMP 之后同 packet id 的后续 PUBLISH 会被当作新消息处理；但 QoS2 去重状态机并不完整。

results.category: Packet Identifier 唯一值分配校验不足
results.reason: 缺少 in-use 集合冲突检测，无法强保证“从未使用值集合选择”。
results.change_condition: Each time a Client sends a new packet of one of these types.
results.original_comment: Broker 端 packet id 为递增分配并跳过 0，但未校验“当前未使用集合”；Client 端由调用方提供 id。

results.category: Packet Identifier 唯一值分配校验不足
results.reason: 仅递增与回绕，未做在用冲突检查。
results.change_action: must be selected from unused values
results.change_condition: In the QoS 1 delivery protocol, each time the Sender has a new Application Message to publish
results.original_comment: QoS1 新消息会分配 packet id，但分配策略缺少“当前未使用”校验。

results.category: Packet Identifier 唯一值分配校验不足
results.reason: QoS2 分配路径同样缺少在用冲突检测。
results.change_action: must be selected from unused values
results.change_condition: In the QoS 2 delivery protocol, when the Sender has a new Application Message to publish
results.original_comment: QoS2 新消息分配 packet id，但未建立“未使用集合”唯一性约束。

results.category: QoS2 Method B 存储/丢弃流程缺失
results.reason: Broker 客户端状态结构中无对应 Method B 去重/丢弃状态存储。
results.change_condition: Method B discard step
results.original_comment: 未实现 Method B 的“discard packet identifier”显式状态迁移。

results.category: QoS2 Method B 存储/丢弃流程缺失
results.reason: 接收 QoS2 PUBLISH 后无对应 packet id 去重缓存。
results.change_condition: Method B receiver handling
results.original_comment: 未发现 Method B 接收端 packet identifier 持久化存储与比对逻辑。

results.category: QoS2 Method B 存储/丢弃流程缺失
results.reason: 流程仅做即时应答，缺少 Method B 语义化状态机。
results.change_condition: On receipt handling indicated by the flow text
results.original_comment: 未实现 Method B 流程里与 packet identifier 相关的存储/丢弃闭环。

results.category: Packet Identifier 非零约束接收校验不足
results.reason: 发送端严格，接收端对非零约束未完全落地。
results.change_condition: SUBSCRIBE, UNSUBSCRIBE, and PUBLISH (in cases where QoS > 0) Control Packets are sent.
results.original_comment: 发送路径对 SUBSCRIBE/UNSUBSCRIBE/PUBLISH(QoS>0) 已做 non-zero 校验；接收解码路径未统一校验 non-zero。

results.category: QoS2 去重状态机覆盖不完整
results.reason: 缺少“等待 PUBREL 期间”去重状态，可能重复分发。
results.change_condition: Until the Receiver has received the corresponding PUBREL packet, and it receives any subsequent PUBLISH packet with the same Packet Identifier
results.original_comment: 收到同 packet id 的后续 QoS2 PUBLISH 时会按当前包回 PUBREC；但“直到收到对应 PUBREL”的去重状态约束不完整。

results.category: CleanSession=0 重连重传机制缺失
results.reason: 重连语义缺失 inflight 重放，无法满足该规则要求。
results.change_condition: When a Client reconnects with CleanSession set to 0 and re-sends unacknowledged PUBLISH Packets and PUBREL Packets
results.original_comment: clean_session=0 重连后仅保留订阅，不会自动重发未确认 PUBLISH/PUBREL。

results.category: CleanSession=0 重连重传机制缺失
results.reason: 实现重点在订阅会话延续，不包含未确认消息重放队列。
results.change_action: must equal original value / reuse original
results.change_condition: When re-sending unacknowledged PUBLISH Packets and PUBREL Packets on reconnect with CleanSession set to 0
results.original_comment: 未实现“重连时未确认 PUBLISH/PUBREL 复用原 packet id 并重发”的自动机制。

results.category: Packet Identifier 释放后复用策略不完整
results.reason: 有“处理后可继续使用”的效果，但缺少统一复用分配约束。
results.change_condition: after the Client has processed the corresponding acknowledgement packet
results.original_comment: ACK 处理后会移除等待响应记录，但 packet id 复用策略依赖调用方/递增器，非显式 in-use 集合管理。

results.category: Packet Identifier 唯一值分配校验不足
results.reason: 缺少端到端“发送前未占用校验”。
results.change_action: set to a currently unused value
results.change_condition: each time a Client sends a new packet of one of these types
results.original_comment: 发送新包时未统一保证“当前未使用值”；仅有 non-zero 或递增分配。

results.category: Packet Identifier 非零约束接收校验不足
results.reason: 编码侧强约束与解码侧弱约束不一致。
results.change_action: must be present and must not equal zero
results.change_condition: for SUBSCRIBE, UNSUBSCRIBE, and PUBLISH (in cases where QoS > 0) Control Packets
results.original_comment: 字段存在性满足；但接收端对 non-zero 的协议约束校验不完整。

results.category: Packet Identifier 重传同值约束覆盖不完整
results.reason: 行为可实现但依赖调用方策略，缺少内建保障。
results.change_action: must equal prior Packet Identifier used for that packet
results.change_condition: if a Client re-sends a particular Control Packet
results.original_comment: 重发时可由调用方复用同 packet id，但库内未形成通用自动重发同 id 的强约束机制。

results.category: Packet Identifier 唯一值分配校验不足
results.reason: 服务端侧同样缺少“当前未使用值”校验闭环。
results.change_action: same requirements apply as for Client assignment and reuse
results.change_condition: when Server sends a PUBLISH with QoS > 0
results.original_comment: Server 发送 QoS>0 PUBLISH 时会分配 packet id，但未做 in-use 冲突检查。

results.category: Password Flag=0 负载一致性校验不足
results.reason: 发送端约束存在，接收端一致性校验不足。
results.change_condition: If the Password Flag is set to 0
results.original_comment: 编码路径可保证 Password Flag=0 时不发送密码字段；但解码后未校验 payload 消费完毕，异常组合可能未被显式拒绝。

results.category: Password Flag=0 负载一致性校验不足
results.reason: 缺少对“Flag=0 但携带密码载荷”场景的显式协议拒绝。
results.change_condition: If the Password Flag is set to 0
results.original_comment: 同 ID139：Password Flag=0 的异常负载一致性校验未完全闭环。

results.category: Password/Username Flag 联动校验不足
results.reason: 发送端做了强约束，接收端未完整实现同等级协议校验。
results.change_action: must be present as next field
results.change_condition: Password Flag is set to 1
results.original_comment: 编码路径保证 Password 与 Username 联动；接收端未显式校验全部联动约束。

results.category: Password Flag=0 负载一致性校验不足
results.reason: 以“是否读取字段”替代了“协议一致性强校验”。
results.change_condition: If the Password Flag is set to 0
results.original_comment: Password Flag=0 的主要语义路径成立，但接收端对异常负载一致性的显式拒绝不足。

results.category: CONNECT Flags 交叉约束接收校验不足
results.reason: 客户端编码强约束已实现，但 broker 解码路径缺失对违规组合的协议级拒绝。
results.change_condition: If the User Name Flag is set to 0
results.original_comment: 编码端已实现 User Name Flag=0 时 Password 不允许存在；接收端未显式拒绝所有违规 flag 组合。

results.category: Password/Username Flag 联动校验不足
results.reason: 顺序正确但联动约束在接收端并未完整硬化。
results.change_condition: Password Flag is set to 1
results.original_comment: Password Flag=1 的字段顺序处理存在，但与 Username/Password 联动一致性校验不完全。

results.category: SUBSCRIBE Payload 最小元素约束缺失
results.reason: 未落实“至少一个 Topic Filter/QoS 对”约束。
results.change_condition: For a SUBSCRIBE packet
results.original_comment: SUBSCRIBE 解码允许空 payload（topic_count=0），且该异常处理未形成规范化拒绝闭环。
